dialogues.text: Hello there, traveler! What brings you to these parts?
Adventure, you say? There are many dangers lurking in the shadows. Are you prepared?

responses.text: I need more time to prepare.

dialogues.text: Ah, a wise choice. Sometimes it's best to tread carefully.
Then let the adventure begin! Follow me.
Gather supplies and strengthen your skills. You'll need them.
Seek out the local merchants and gather information. Knowledge is power.
